text:
First, note: US/Mountain time zone in 1151 did not observe DST and had a standard offset of UTC-7 (based on historical LMT/standard time conventions for that region, though time zones weren't standardized until 20th century; for historical problems, we assume UTC-7 for Mountain Time in that era).  

8 PM = 20:00 Mountain Time (UTC-7).  
Convert to UTC: add 7 hours.  

20:00 + 7 hours = 27:00 → 03:00 next day.  

December 27, 1151, 20:00 MT → December 28, 1151, 03:00 UTC.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1151-12-28 03:00
